name: The Photograph Eats the Room
description: Explore a projected room, capture two physically visible source geometries, carry and transform their photo planes, develop a bridge and doorway into collision reality, then navigate to the terminal.
natural_language: Use photographs to reshape the room and reach the verification terminal.

metadata.notes: Original procedural perspective room. The browser necessarily receives render geometry, but no solution transform is rendered; camera-frustum capture, photo placement, development mapping, collision, and traversal are independently replayed.
